# Import

## Load libraries

```{r libraries, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# General
library(ragg) # graphics device
library(here) # for file access
library(haven) # for importing .xpt

# Statistics
library(matrixStats) # used for weighted variance calculation
library(emmeans) # for pairwise comparisons
library(mgcv) # used to train model
library(tidytable) # for fast data loading

# Visualization
library(kableExtra) # for pretty tables
library(ggthemes) # for theme_few()
library(ggtext) # for element_markdown()
library(ggh4x) # for element_rect()
library(ggpubr) # for ggarrange()
library(cowplot) # for combined plots 
library(sameplot) # for plotting consistently

# Data operations
library(data.table) # for speedy dataframes 
library(tidyverse) # for general data operations
```

## Print params for knitted reports

```{r print_params}
kable(as.data.frame(unclass(params)))
```

## Import Data

.xpt files are loaded, then stripped of extension. The year is stored. All files
per year are merged horizontally (adding columns) by the SEQN column. Each
yearly merged file is then added vertically (stacked rows).

```{r import_data}
import_nhanes_data <- function(path) {
  path
  files <- list.files(
    path,
    pattern = "\\.xpt$",
    full.names = TRUE,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
  
  meta <- data.table(file  = files,
                     year = str_extract(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(files)), "\\d{4}-\\d{4}$"))
  
  meta[, dt := lapply(file, \(f) as.data.table(read_xpt(f)))]
  by_year <- split(meta$dt, meta$year)
  
  as.data.frame(rbindlist(
    lapply(by_year, \(dts)
           Reduce(\(x, y) merge(
             x, y, by = "SEQN", all = TRUE
           ), dts)),
    fill = TRUE,
    use.names = TRUE,
    idcol = "year"
  ))
}

if (isTRUE(params$construct_data)) {
  df_raw <- import_nhanes_data(here("Data", "Raw data"))
} else {
  df_raw <- read.csv(here("Data", "dataset_bioage.csv"))
}
```
